reviews.comment:
Cuando voy a Formosa casi siempre cargo allí,el tema es que no te dicen que que no anda para cargar los puntos y uno como seguidor de YPF quiere los puntos ,si no tienen para cargar que digan antes ,así se busca otra estación para realizar dichos trámites.

(Translated by Google)
When I go to Formosa I almost always fill up there, the problem is that they don't tell you that the points system isn't working and as a YPF customer I want the points system, if they don't have the points system, they should say so beforehand, so you can find another station to carry out those procedures.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13088641644358785510/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURiaUstdzNRRRAB
